dashboard.png.description: Dashboard showing recent resources and notes overview with thumbnail grid

upload-form.png.description: Create resource form with file upload, URL download, tags/groups/notes relation fields, and owner picker

note-blocks.png.description: Note detail page with heading block, text paragraph block, and todo list block with checkboxes

group-tree.png.description: Hierarchical group tree view showing root groups with category labels and child count

group-detail.png.description: Group detail page showing description, sub-groups, owned resources/notes, tag management, and merge/clone tools
group-detail.png.seedDetails: Parent group with child groups and owned resources

search-results.png.description: Filtered resource search results with name filter applied showing matching thumbnails
search-results.png.seedDetails: Resources with 'Sample' in name for filter to match

query-editor.png.description: Saved query detail page with SQL query text and Run button

activity-log.png.description: Activity log table showing time, level, action, entity, and message columns with filter sidebar
activity-log.png.seedDetails: Any entity creation/modification generates log entries automatically

tag-list.png.description: Tags listing page with card grid showing tag names and descriptions, plus filter sidebar

category-list.png.description: Category management page with card grid showing category names and descriptions, plus filter sidebar

global-search.png.description: Global search modal (Cmd/Ctrl+K) showing search results across all entity types with keyboard navigation hints
global-search.png.seedDetails: Resources with 'Sample' in name for search results

bulk-selection.png.description: Bulk selection toolbar showing Add Tag, Remove Tag, Add Field, Add Groups, Update Dimensions, and Delete operations
bulk-selection.png.seedDetails: Multiple resources available; click Select All to show toolbar

plugin-management.png.description: Plugin management page showing discovered plugins with version, description, enable/disable controls, settings forms, and purge data option
plugin-management.png.seedDetails: 3 plugins discovered: example-blocks (enabled), example-plugin (enabled, with settings), fal-ai (disabled, with API key setting)

version-compare.png.description: Version comparison page showing OLD/NEW resource pickers, diff summary banner (Files differ, Type Match, Size delta, Dimensions), metadata diff cards, and side-by-side image preview with compare modes (Slider, Onion skin, Toggle)
version-compare.png.seedDetails: Resource with 3 versions (different sizes/dimensions) for comparison

download-queue.png.description: Dashboard page showing the download queue FAB button in bottom-right corner for initiating background URL downloads
download-queue.png.seedDetails: Dashboard with recent resources; download FAB is always visible

resource-versions.png.description: Resource detail page scrolled to show Versions panel with version list (v1/v2/v3), download/restore/delete controls, compare button, and upload new version form
